//: Local `n8n-node release` runs release-it with this project config (verified in @n8n/node-cli release.js: it adds --git.* flags but tagName/commitMessage/plugins come from here) to bump the version + CHANGELOG from conventional commits, then commit/tag/push and cut a GitHub release — it does NOT publish to npm (passes --npm.publish=false). In CI (GITHUB_ACTIONS), the same `npm run release` instead lints, builds, and `npm publish`es with provenance. The v-prefixed tagName below MUST match publish.yml's `v*.*.*` trigger.

npm.//: Do NOT let release-it publish. The publish.yml GitHub Action publishes with OIDC provenance on the pushed tag.
